programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Baba befriends a caterpillar but can't find it again when he brings Mama to meet it.
Oona practices her flying with Otto.
Happy is determined to make a swing all by himself, but the best solutions come when you listen to new ideas.
Trains: Bingo is a model citizen who commutes on the 'Dad Train'. However, there's trouble on the line when a mischievous Bluey throws everyone off schedule.
Oswaldo A Crazy Stopover: Oswaldo, Leia and Tobias are heading to a concert by bus. They stop at a diner with an evil A.I. robot that wants to keep them locked there.
Oswaldo From 9 to 915: Weird and wonderful adventures with the penguin and his friends.
When Daniel receives a new 'Tigey the Adventure Tiger' book from Grandpere in the mail, he sits down to read it, but keeps getting distracted by Margaret.
Helium ropes in Nitrogen and Oxygen to transform their wild garden into a perfect croquet lawn, but pesky Arsenic's got other ideas.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'digger' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.
Glitch visits Rome to race his Grimbots in the Colosseum. Can the Go Jetters stop him?.
A camping trip with Preston goes very wrong when he won't let them use Mojo's tops. But camping Preston's way soon starts a fire, and it's Mojo and Bo to the rescue!
The Deco-Detectives: The Festival of Lights gets off to a bad start when decorations disappear. Following the clues, the doll and the pony find themselves in a funny situation.
Dream Vacation: Ms. Woodley deserves a break from the busy farm... but her animals have other ideas! Ollie and Titus plan a special getaway,

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Fame Monster: Fur Taxi is on the verge of ruin. Their passengers often pay their fares with random things, leaving Lex and Plu with nothing to purchase fuel.
Dad Day: Odo spends the day with his dad and they discover a new way of playing the double bass that involves pinecones and lots of kicking.
Bird Table: Odo tries to help his dad assemble a flat pack table.
Hugo and Sonia are finding it tricky to make their paper pinwheel spin but soon learn the fun was in the trying. (SL)
A mystery map doesn't lead to the treasure Hugo and Sonia had hoped for but instead leads to an even more exciting treasure, their family. (SL)
Follow Lantern Song: A floating lantern follows Moon around, narrating Moon's every move in an opera-singing voice. Fuzzy Yellow helps Moon make it go away. (SL)
Baba befriends a caterpillar but can't find it again when he brings Mama to meet it.
Oona practices her flying with Otto.
Happy is determined to make a swing all by himself, but the best solutions come when you listen to new ideas.
Say Cheese: When Mae-Mae accidentally loses Phoebe's special photo album, she must use Zip's camera to replace it.
Henry meets a friendly Fire Engine. It's his first day on the job and he's a little nervous when a call comes in about a cat stuck up a tree.
Delivery: Stanley helps Hattie, Fred and Fifi set up a food delivery service.
Noisy Night: There is a terrible noise and no one can sleep. Stanley and Myrtle go on a mystery tour of the town to work out who it is.
Pre-school animation about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her.
Práinn Chiaráin: Nuair a thagann Ciarán ar bord - eachtrán atá cosúil le cairéad a bhí sáinnithe - aontaíonn siad é a thabhairt abhaile... mura n-íosfaidh Bubby é ar dtús!
Caint Tuathail: Nuair a fhaigheann Adam agus a chriú glao éigeandála ó eachtrán darb ainm Breo, caithfidh siad a theanga aisteach a thuiscint chun é a shábháil ó stoirmeacha contúirteacha.
Running Like Clockwork: When an elephant's itch makes everyone late, Jimmy decides that Mr. Peek needs a timetable.
The Big 1-5-0: It's Horace the Tortoise's birthday, and everyone is there to celebrate.
Tá an grúpa spraoi ag iarraidh airgead a bhailiú. Líonann siad ciseán le rudaí deasa a bheidh duine de na tuismitheoirí in ann a bhuachan ach ticéad raifil a cheannach ar dtús.
Déanann Daddy Pig glóthach in éineacht le Peppa agus George.
Síofra is posting letters to all her friends. Everyone in Tír na nÓg is meeting new friends today.
Polly the pelican loves playing hide-and-seek and even hides sandwiches in her beak so she doesn't have to go home for lunch. That way, she can play all day.
Harold the hammerhead shark has a good sense of smell. However, he doesn't know much about animals and gets very muddled over which animal is which.
Simon wants to throw things away. The others teach him to upcycle.
Who's the Strongest: The gang clear a path blocked by fallen rocks.
Andy And The Black Crested Macaques: Andy jets off to Sulawesi in search of exotic fruits to feed the black crested macaques at Safari World.
A camping trip with Preston goes very wrong when he won't let them use Mojo's tops. But camping Preston's way soon starts a fire, and it's Mojo and Bo to the rescue!

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: The Stinking Delivery: None of the engines want to deliver a super stinky compost delivery, so they make a 'hide and stink' game sneakily coupling it to each other.
Xylophone: While donating some old items to Higgledy Heros charity shop, Maddie has doubts about giving away her old xylophone - can she really let go of her very first musical instrument?!

Mission: No Dogs Allowed: Charli is meeting her friend Annabel for lunch at the local cafe.
Snag: Agus BaBa ag gáire, tagann snag uirthi agus tá sé go fóill uirthi agus í ar a bealach go Crann Spraoi.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Oona and Baba find Silky admiring some seahorses in a rock pool.
Flynn brags that her special fur keeps her warm, prompting Messy to acquire some for his own benefit.
Olivia feels angry when everyone fights for a turn with her new boat.
Army: On Jack's first day at Bluey's school, Calypso suggests he plays Army outside with Rusty in the bush
Mr Ramirez Secret: After a client shares a secret, Tobias wonders if his dad sacrificed his true dream.
Launch Day Quest: Oswaldo, Leia and Tobias must find a way around a massive line for the new game they want.
On their way to the post office, Dad tells Daniel he can't play at the park, and that makes Daniel mad!
Carbon tries to take a shortcut when helping Oxygen prepare for her teddy bears picnic.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'donkey' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.
The grimbots attach a bit of the Taj Mahal to GrimHQ. Can the Go Jetters fix the glitch?
Cap'n Gail's tall tale of a nine-legged octopus in Lake Swoppiton has everyone panicking. But Mojo and Bo wonder: is the story real, or is Cap'n Gail up to something?
Freezy Town: Winter has arrived in the attic! Nina warns of an endless cold snap, and everyone retreats to their homes.
Cork Invaders: Strange creatures are taking over Attic Town! Everyone is panicking... except Ollie and Titus, who are sure they're just corks.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Foreseeing is Believing: Right after Lex, Plu, Trish, Greg, and Crispy finish watching the season finale of Gunnar the Gumshoe, they get a new customer - a soothsayer called Benedict.
The Baby Sitter: Leanardo is trying to show off his brand new feathers, and becomes jealous when sharing attention with baby Eaglet.
Sleepwalking: The campers are trying to get in the Forest Book of Records, but all of their record breaking attempts are derailed by a sleepwalking Pigeon Post.
Sonia keeps interrupting Hugo as he reads her a book until she learns the importance of waiting for the end. (SL)
Hugo and Sonia learn to take their time while helping to paint a wall. (SL)
Wild Under Bees: Fuzzy Yellow and friends recall the day they first met Buff, their favourite wild beast. (SL)
Oona and Baba find Silky admiring some seahorses in a rock pool.
Flynn brags that her special fur keeps her warm, prompting Messy to acquire some for his own benefit.
Olivia feels angry when everyone fights for a turn with her new boat.
Big Sister Day: Hooper is planning a special surprise party for his big sister Phoebe. The friends ask Hooper if he needs any help, but he wants to do it all by himself.
Henry meets a friendly Digger. There is a house that needs to be built but with the builder off work with a tummy ache it's up to Henry to save the day.
Can-Bots: Stanley is needed for so many jobs he creates 3 special robots - his Can-Bots - to help him.
Sophie Can Do: Sophie's beloved dino-costume has been washed and is drying on the line.
Pre-school animation about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her.
Bualadh Bos Bubby: Creideann eachtráin go bhfuil bithiúnach réaltra ar bord An Shelby.
Fan... Grúiblín Eile?: Nuair a shábhálann an criú grúiblín eile darb ainm Zaza, bíonn áthas an domhain ar Zuzu - ach go luath mothaíonn sí go bhfuil rud éigin aisteach faoin eachtrán nua seo.
The Lost Voice: Mr Peek loses his voice at a football match and there's a full day of work ahead. How will he tell Jimmy and Violet what to do?
Stonker Honker: Mr. Peek decides Walter the sealion should learn a musical instrument.
Tá Mummy agus Daddy ag cur George ar an bpota.
Tá Peppa agus a cairde ag spraoi i bpáirc na dtrampailíní.
There's an art exhibition happening today in Tír na nÓg. Oisín goes in search of artistic inspiration.
Sebastian the Kangaroo is like any normal kangaroo but, instead of a pouch, Sebastian carries a large red bag. It's amazing just how much Sebastian has in his bag.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters including Scoopy the Pink Rabbit.
Tallulah has hurt her back preventing her from doing her job.
Mine Mine Mine: Today is Red Berry Day. Red Berry Day involves picking red berries together and sharing them among the group.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go

Gaoth: Lá gaofar atá ann. Tá MeMo agus BaBa ag baint sult as a bheith ag súgradh le roithleáin. Ag Am Spraoi cuireann siad eiteog ag eitilt sa ghaoth.
